2605.14344.title: CrystalReasoner: Reasoning and RL for Property-Conditioned Crystal Structure Generation
2605.14344.paper_summary: Generative modeling has emerged as a promising approach for crystal structure discovery. However, existing LLM-based generative models struggle with low-level atomic precision, while diffusion-based methods fall short in integrating high-level scientific knowledge. As a result, generated structures are often invalid, unstable, or do not possess desirable properties. To address this gap, we propose CrystalReasoner (\method), an end-to-end LLM framework that generates crystal structures from natural language instructions through reasoning and alignment. \method introduces physical priors as thinking tokens, which include crystallographic symmetry, local coordination environments and predicted physical properties before generating atomic coordinates. This bridges the gap between natural language and 3D structures. \method then employs reinforcement learning (RL) with a multi-objective, dense reward function to align generation with physical validity, chemical consistency, and thermodynamic stability. For property-conditioned tasks, we design task-specific reward functions and train specialized models for discrete constraints (e.g., space group) and continuous properties (e.g., elasticity, thermal expansion). Empirical results demonstrate that compared to prior works and baselines without thinking traces or RL, \method obtains better performance on diverse metrics, triples S.U.N. ratio, and achieves better performance for property conditioned generation. \method also exhibits adaptive reasoning, increasing reasoning lengths as the number of atoms increases. Our work demonstrates the potential of leveraging thinking traces and RL for generating valid, stable, and property-conditioned crystal structures. Please see our work at https://crystalreasoner.github.io/ .
2605.14344.paper_summary_zh: 生成模型已成為晶體結構發現的一種有前景的方法。<lb/>然而，現有的基於大型語言模型（LLM）的生成模型在低層次的原子精度上存在困難，而基於擴散的方法在整合高層次科學知識方面則顯得不足。<lb/>因此，生成的結構往往是無效的、不穩定的，或不具備理想的屬性。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了CrystalReasoner（\method），這是一個端到端的LLM框架，通過推理和對齊，從自然語言指令生成晶體結構。<lb/>\method引入物理先驗作為思考標記，包括晶體對稱性、局部協調環境和預測的物理性質，然後再生成原子坐標。<lb/>這彌補了自然語言與三維結構之間的差距。<lb/>\method隨後採用強化學習（RL），使用多目標的密集獎勵函數，將生成與物理有效性、化學一致性和熱力學穩定性對齊。<lb/>對於屬性條件任務，我們設計了特定任務的獎勵函數，並為離散約束（例如，空間群）和連續性質（例如，彈性、熱膨脹）訓練專門的模型。<lb/>實證結果表明，與之前的工作和沒有思考痕跡或RL的基準相比，\method在多樣化的指標上表現更佳，三重S.U.N.比率也有所提升，並在屬性條件生成方面取得了更好的性能。<lb/>\method還展現了自適應推理，隨著原子數量的增加，推理長度也隨之增加。<lb/>我們的工作展示了利用思考痕跡和RL生成有效、穩定且具屬性條件的晶體結構的潛力。<lb/>請參見我們的工作：https://crystalreasoner.github.io/ 。
2605.14344.author: Yuyang Wu et.al.
2605.14344.authors: Yuyang Wu, Stefano Falletta, Delia McGrath, Sherry Yang
